contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 120
- Description: Currency Conversion hardening + Outbound Review polish + velocity refresh
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/280
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/281
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/63
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/228
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/229
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/230
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/231
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse-inventory/pull/9
  
  Details:
  Currency Conversion parser/write hardening + Outbound Review polish + velocity refresh
  
  Cluster of work across dapp, tokenomics, truesight_me, and agroverse-inventory after the morning's
  Outbound Review hand-off. Covers the currency-conversion ingest bug surfaced by the
  Kirsten Ritschel repackaging incident, two truesight.me UI fixes, three currency_conversion.html UX
  upgrades, and a final velocity refresh.
  
  Shipped:
  
  1. TrueSightDAO/tokenomics#280 — Currency Conversion parser + write hardening:
     - Ledger URL regex fix: '\\s*([^\\n]+)' was greedy-eating the newline after an empty
       value and grabbing the next payload line as the URL ('- Warehouse Manager: …'). Now
       '[ \\t]*([^\\n]*)' — match spaces/tabs only, allow empty capture.
     - Silent appendRow noop → false PROCESSED audit. The 2026-05-11 Kirsten incident wrote
       Status=PROCESSED with ledger_lines='3297,3297' even though no rows landed in offchain
       transactions. Now captures beforeAppendLastRow, SpreadsheetApp.flush() after each
       append, asserts getLastRow grew, throws to FAILED on noop.
     - Ledger Lines column auto-parsed as integer. setValue('3298,3299') → en-US thousands
       parse → number 32983299. Now setNumberFormat('@') before write keeps it text.
     - Column O on the Currency Conversion intake sheet set to plain-text format via batch
       update; two existing audit rows with garbage Ledger URL value cleared.
  
  2. TrueSightDAO/tokenomics#281 — Destination Amount column always lands as a number:
     - Explicit Number() coercion + Number.isFinite() check for both debit and credit
       amounts; throws to FAILED rather than landing NaN-as-text.
     - setNumberFormat('0.00000000') on col D right after each appendRow so the cell stays
       numeric even if the destination's column default drifts to TEXT (precedent: offchain
       transactions row 2811 had col D='50.00000000' as text and silently dropped from
       aggregations). Backfilled that row to numeric 50.
  
  3. TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta#63 — By Partner header left-align. The <th>Partner</th>
     cell had no explicit text-align, so the user-agent default 'th { text-align: center }'
     won over the parent <tr style='text-align:left'>. Added explicit text-align:left so
     header sits flush with the partner-name cells below.
  
  4. Local-only fixes in truesight_me/index.html (not yet PR'd this session but loaded on
     the running local instance for review):
     - By Partner expand click was bound to the wrong table, used data-pid lookup vulnerable
       to dupes, and a duplicate innerHTML wiped the listener. Switched to #partner-table
       selector + nextElementSibling traversal + removed redundant innerHTML.
     - partner-row border moved from border-bottom to border-top so an expanded detail row
       anchors visually to its parent partner instead of floating into the next partner.
     - First td of partner-row and partner-detail given explicit text-align:left + 12px
       horizontal padding.
  
  5. TrueSightDAO/dapp#228, #229, #230, #231 — Outbound Review enhancements:
     - #228: shop name header inside each <details> panel so reviewers don't lose context
       scrolling through long-thread bodies.
     - #229: URL hash carries '#tab/d-{gmail_draft_id}' so reviewers can copy the browser
       URL straight to an LLM CLI to redo a draft. Auto-expand + scroll + yellow ring on
       deep-linked load.
     - #230: per-card 'All correspondence' link to Gmail #search/{to_email}.
     - #231: clicking 'Edit in Gmail' or 'All correspondence' also pins the draft id in the
       URL hash.
  
  6. dapp/currency_conversion.html (not yet PR'd this session, local instance running):
     - Replaced <input list='commonCurrencies'> + <datalist> with a custom combobox: clickable
       toggle, type-or-pick, full-list-on-focus, keyboard nav, free-text still allowed.
     - Receipt upload moved below Description; paste-image-in-Description routes the file to
       the receipt attachment slot (and prevents binary-as-text junk in the textarea).
     - Submit button center-aligned via display:block.
     - .currency-pair grid collapsed from 1fr/1.5fr to single-column so long SKU/packaging
       names display in full.
     - After a successful submission the button flips to 'Submit a New Report' and clicking
       it resets the form (currencies, amounts, date, description, receipt, output area,
       rate display) for a fresh entry without forcing a page refresh.
  
  7. TrueSightDAO/agroverse-inventory#9 — partners-velocity.json refresh. 331 QR Code Sales
     rows + 408 Inventory Movement rows; 20 partners with velocity data; category medians
     for 7 SKUs.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 200.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
